_readme: SoundForge manifest — THE customization surface. Each entry is one game sound (id must match ProtoAudio's stream id). To customize a sound: edit its prompt here, then run `node tools/soundforge/generate.mjs <id> --force` and re-import. The game loads game/assets/sfx/<id>.mp3 when it exists, else falls back to the synthesized version. Full workflow: tools/soundforge/README.md

sounds.prompt: Single 9mm pistol gunshot, dry and sharp, close range, post-apocalyptic wasteland ambience, short tail, no reverb wash
Single pump-action shotgun blast, heavy and punchy, close range, gritty, short mechanical pump chk-chk at the end
Car explosion, deep boom with metal debris scattering on asphalt, distant echo across empty highway
Gun magazine reload click, crisp single mechanical snap, dry, close
Single sharp dog bark, medium-large dog, alert warning bark, outdoors
Low menacing dog growl, guttural, sustained, close, threatening
Male grunt of pain, short sharp exhale, getting hit, gritty realistic
Small retro UI blip, single short soft electronic tick, subtle, interface confirm
Old wooden door creaking open slowly, rusty hinges, abandoned house
Fast melee weapon swing whoosh, heavy metal wrench cutting air, single swipe, short
Heavy blunt impact on flesh and bone, dull meaty thunk, single hit, visceral, short
Tiny dry hit-marker tick, very short subtle click confirm, videogame hit feedback, quiet
Old car horn honk, two quick blasts, slightly detuned rusty vehicle, outdoors
Distant wolf-like creature howl at night, eerie rising and falling, echoing across empty wasteland, ominous, slightly wrong and mutated
Old V8 car engine idling steadily, seamless loop, constant rpm, throaty rumble, no fade in or out, mechanical, worn muscle car
Vehicle fire burning steadily, crackling flames with occasional pops, seamless loop, no fade in or out
